subject: [PATCH v2 02/14] fuse: refactor io-uring header copying to ring

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch refactors the logic for copying headers to a ring in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) io-uring implementation. It extracts the header copying into a new function called copy_header_to_ring(), which makes the code more modular and easier to understand. The function handles errors and rate-limited logging, making it more robust. This change improves the maintainability of the code and reduces duplication.
